spec.reasoning: This task deletes/inserts rows, so title_row_insert is unsafe per risk flags. The headers in this spreadsheet are numeric data values (account numbers, dates, amounts) rather than descriptive column names — the instruction references columns by letter (A, B, E), not by header name, so renaming headers would risk corrupting data. Instead I use two safe perturbations: (1) Sheet rename from 'Sheet1' to 'DataSheet' to test whether agents hardcode the sheet name. (2) A distractor column 'AccountRef' added after the last column — this is plausibly similar to the account number concept in column A but clearly different, testing whether agents incorrectly reference it. The answer position updates to 'DataSheet'!A3:H28 (with the extra column). instruction_paraphrase is set to false to avoid changing meaning.
